CONTENT.Club career: Peli is a product of Atalanta youth teams and started playing and won the title for their Under-19 squad in the 2018–19 season.In the 2017–18 and 2018–19 seasons he was called up to the senior squad on several occasions, but did not make any appearances.He joined the newly-promoted Serie C club Como on loan in July 2019.He made his professional Serie C debut for Como in September 2019 in a game against Renate. He substituted Alessandro Gabrielloni in the 81st minute.In August 2020 he went to Reggina (newly promoted to Serie B) on loan.In January 2021 he returned to Como on loan. The loan was extended on 16 July 2021.On 15 July 2022, Peli joined Novara on loan. The loan was terminated early on 31 January 2023. On the same day, Peli was loaned to Pontedera in Serie C.On 17 August 2023, Peli was loaned by Ancona.
CONTENT.International: In 2017 and 2018, he played several friendlies for the Italy national under-18 football team.

SUMMARY: Lorenzo Peli (born 24 January 2000) is an Italian football player who plays for Serie C Group B club Pontedera on loan from Atalanta.
